question: Putnam Top 100 #2: Will any AI score in the top 100 Putnam scorers by start of 2026?

content.text: . Note that it happens every December.
The AI must score in the top 100 for a particular year.
By "top 100" I mean that its score must be >= the score of the 100th place scorer. (If 100th place is a tie I'll use the tying score).

we know the details of the training date, then the training data must all have been released prior to the release of the Putnam questions for that year. i.e. if ModelNet is run on the 2026 Putnam, it must be trained on data from before the date of the 2026 Putnam exam.
before the relevant exam, as long as the data predates the exam.
The scoring for the AI's exam must either be done by the actual Putnam scorers, mathematicians who

been Putnam scorers, or mathematicians who are actively involved in competitive mathematics in some way. (i.e. a professor who runs a university's competitive team counts, a software engineer who did well in the Putnam 5 years ago does not).
accept scoring that isn't blinded, but I reserve the right to ignore any scoring that's vaguely suspect/biased/etc.

textDescription:
Putnam exam link. Note that it happens every December.

The AI must score in the top 100 for a particular year.

By "top 100" I mean that its score must be >= the score of the 100th place scorer. (If 100th place is a tie I'll use the tying score).

If we know the details of the training date, then the training data must all have been released prior to the release of the Putnam questions for that year. i.e. if ModelNet is run on the 2026 Putnam, it must be trained on data from before the date of the 2026 Putnam exam.

The AI does not have to be trained before the relevant exam, as long as the data predates the exam.

The scoring for the AI's exam must either be done by the actual Putnam scorers, mathematicians who have been Putnam scorers, or mathematicians who are actively involved in competitive mathematics in some way. (i.e. a professor who runs a university's competitive team counts, a software engineer who did well in the Putnam 5 years ago does not).

I may accept scoring that isn't blinded, but I reserve the right to ignore any scoring that's vaguely suspect/biased/etc.

question: Will the Freedom Flotilla reach Gaza by June 15, 2025?

content.text: The Freedom Flotilla Coalition, including activists like Greta Thunberg and actor Liam Cunningham, plans to sail to Gaza to deliver aid. Previous flotillas have faced interceptions. This market resolves YES if the flotilla reaches Gaza by June 15, 2025.

question: Will Israel strike Iran's nuclear facilities before the end of 2025?

content.text: A nuclear site is any Iranian facility used for the development, enrichment, storage, or processing of nuclear material or technology, including reactors, enrichment facilities, uranium mines, and research centers located on Iranian soil.

Such a strike must be widely assumed to be perpetrated by Israel and must cause clear physical damage as a direct goal of the attack. It must take place after the creation of this market and before 01/01/2026. Will resolve according to time the attack took place, not time of reporting.
If there is ambiguity I will use my personal best judgement. I will not bet on this market.

textDescription:
A nuclear site is any Iranian facility used for the development, enrichment, storage, or processing of nuclear material or technology, including reactors, enrichment facilities, uranium mines, and research centers located on Iranian soil.

Such a strike must be widely assumed to be perpetrated by Israel and must cause clear physical damage as a direct goal of the attack. It must take place after the creation of this market and before 01/01/2026. Will resolve according to time the attack took place, not time of reporting.

If there is ambiguity I will use my personal best judgement. I will not bet on this market.
